Article Title: IPL 2026: Shane Watson lauds Varun Chakravarthy for playing through pain
Article Text:
Kolkata Knight Riders' (KKR) assistant coach Shane Watson commnded Varun Chakaravarthy for his efforts for the team as he played through pain. (photo/IANS)

KOLKATA: Kolkata Knight Riders’ assistant coach Shane Watson was all praise for Varun Chakravarthy’s commitment to the franchise as the spinner was playing through pain over the past few matches. Chakravarthy did play a big role in reviving KKR’s fortunes in the latter half of this season which kept them alive in the race for playoffs.“Well, I’m not exactly sure of where he is on his rehab journey at the moment. All I do know is he’s obviously playing through a bit of pain at the moment, which just shows how brave he is, how much he wants to be here to be able to contribute for KKR, and he’s still bowling beautifully,” Watson said after KKR’s four-wicket win against Mumbai Indians in a rain-affected match that spilled over into Thursday.Chakravarthy, who has reportedly suffered a hairline fracture in his left foot while fielding, has been in great discomfort and was seen limping at times on the field. Even a day before the MI game, the spinner practised behind the black sight screen alone away from the media and public glare.Although a hue and cry was raised over pushing a BCCI centrally contracted player into action, board secretary Devajit Saikia cleared the issue stating “so far as IPL is concerned, franchises take care of the injuries and fitness of the players.The monitoring is there but when the IPL is going on, we cannot interfere too much.”But strangely the same logic did not apply for Cameron Green in the early half of this IPL when KKR skipper Ajinkya Rahane claimed only the Australian cricket board knew why the all-rounder did not bowl in the team’s thrashing against MI in their first matchCricket Australia, however, was quick to respond to that stating that KKR had been informed well in advance that Green would not bowl in the first 10-12 days of the IPL due to a back injury.“Cameron has a lower back injury which is being managed but requires him to abstain from bowling for a short period,” a CA spokesperson said. “KKR has been communicated with us and is fully aware of this information,” he added. Green not bowling harmed KKR’s team combination, but they had to accept it and in the process suffered a number of losses.It now remains to be seen whether Chakravarthy, viewed as a T20 specialist, recovers in time for the UK tour beginning on June 26.
Article Summary: Kolkata Knight Riders' assistant coach Shane Watson commnded Varun Chakaravarthy for his efforts for the team as he played through pain. Chakravarthy, who has reportedly suffered a hairline fracture in his left foot while fielding, has been in great discomfort and was seen limping on the field.

Article Title: Shubman Gill silences CSK crowd with a stunning screamer to dismiss Shivam Dube - Watch
Article Text:
Shubman Gill's catch (ANI Photo)

Poll What impressed you the most in Gujarat Titans’ win over CSK? Shubman Gill’s brilliant captaincy and catch GT’s powerful batting performance

Gujarat Titans skipper Shubman Gill produced a breathtaking moment in the field during GT’s high-stakes IPL 2026 clash against Chennai Super Kings at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad, pulling off a sensational diving catch to dismiss the dangerous Shivam Dube The catch came during a one-sided contest that saw Gujarat Titans officially eliminate CSK from the playoff race while also sealing a top-two finish for themselves. GT ended the league stage with nine wins and five defeats from 14 matches, completing a dominant season double over Chennai.Chasing a massive target of 230, CSK’s innings fell apart early as they slumped to 29/3 under relentless pressure from GT’s pace attack. However, Shivam Dube launched a stunning counterattack that briefly gave Chennai hope. The left-hander smashed 47 runs off just 17 balls, hammering four sixes and four boundaries in a fearless assault that threatened to shift momentum back towards CSK.But just as Dube looked set for something special, Gill stepped up with a game-changing effort in the field. Attempting another big hit off a length delivery from Rashid Khan 's over, Dube mistimed the shot high over the infield. Gill sprinted backward from the cover region, kept his eyes fixed on the swirling ball, and completed a superb full-length diving catch inches above the turf to send the CSK batter back to the pavilion.The GT captain then added more drama to the moment with an animated celebration. After securing the catch, Gill turned towards the crowd and gestured for the CSK supporters to stay silent, signaling the end of Chennai’s final realistic hopes in the contest.Earlier in the match, GT’s top order had completely dominated proceedings after being sent in to bat first. Gill smashed 64 off 37 deliveries while Sai Sudharsan continued his remarkable season with a fluent 84 off 53 balls. Jos Buttler then provided the late fireworks with a blistering unbeaten 57 off just 23 deliveries as Gujarat piled up a daunting 229/4.CSK never recovered from the early blows delivered by Mohammed Siraj , who removed Sanju Samson for a duck and captain Ruturaj Gaikwad cheaply. Despite Dube’s explosive cameo, Rashid Khan and Kagiso Rabada cleaned up the lower order as CSK were bowled out for just 140 in 13.4 overs.
Article Summary: Gujarat Titans skipper Shubman Gill produced a breathtaking moment in the field during GT’s high-stakes IPL 2026 clash against Chennai Super Kings. Gill pulled off a sensational diving catch to dismiss the dangerous Shivam Dube. The catch came during a one-sided contest that saw Gujarat Titans officially eliminate CSK from the playoff race.

Article Title: Yesterday match result: Gujarat Titans finish off Chennai Super Kings in style
Article Text:
Shubman Gill and Sai Sudharsan shine in Gujarat Titans's 89-run win over Chennai Super Kings (photo/ AP)

AHMEDABAD: Gujarat Titans didn’t put a foot wrong on Thursday as they closed in on a top-two berth and finished off Chennai Super Kings ’ IPL campaign for this year.While the batters led by the terrific trio of Shubman Gill, Sai Sudharshan and Jos Buttler did the early damage, Mohammed Siraj took 3-26 in his first spell to all but finish off CSK. Siraj moved the ball around just a bit and hit the hard length to have the wickets of Sanju Samson, Ruturaj Gaikwad and Urvil Patel that put CSK in a deep hole chasing 230.Earlier, Gill turned on the style as he smashed a 64 off 37 balls (7x4, 3x6) after being asked to bat first. B Sai Sudharsan (84 off 53b; 7x4, 4x6) and Jos Buttler (57* off 27b; 5x4, 4x6) chipped in as CSK found themselves on the wrong foot in the must-win game.The intent from the first ball was to maximise the Powerplay on a flat pitch. Gill began with a neat leg-glance off left-arm pacer Mukesh Choudhary. In the next over off Spencer Johnson, sandwiched between a classy punch by Gill through the point region and a sublime straight drive, was a delivery down the leg side that injured Sanju Samson's index finger and forced the visitors to replace him with Urvil Patel behind the stumps.Gill lofted Anshul Kamboj over the mid-wicket boundary for his first maximum before meting out the same treatment to left-arm wrist spinner Noor Ahmad, hoicking him for sixes over deep mid-wicket to race to his half-century off 23 balls. However, leftarm pacer Gurjapneet Singh delivered quiet overs after the Powerplay, and Sudharsan’s inability to force the pace at the same time exerted pressure on his captain, who skied a length ball by Johnson in the 13th over and Shivam Dube completed a running catch.His dismissal brought Buttler to the strike, who quickly got into the business by hitting the Afghan for two sixes in the 14th over. Along with Sudharsan, Buttler added 82 off 37 balls to sustain the momentum of the 125-run opening wicket partnership.
Article Summary: Gujarat Titans beat Chennai Super Kings by 89 runs. Shubman Gill, Sai Sudharsan and Jos Buttler top scored for Titans. Mohammed Siraj took 3-26 in his first spell to all but finish off CSK.

Article Title: "Not to put all expectations": Neymar Jr’s latest injury setback sends panic through Brazil camp ahead of World Cup
Article Text:
Neymar Jr suffered a fresh calf injury just days after being included in Brazil’s 2026 FIFA World Cup squad, raising new concerns over his fitness. Santos confirmed the forward has swelling in his right calf but expects him to recover in time for Brazil’s preparations. Carlo Ancelotti backed Neymar publicly while stressing that no player is guaranteed a starting role ahead of the tournament.

Neymar Jr injury setback worries Brazil before 2026 FIFA World Cup

Carlo Ancelotti sends clear Neymar message ahead of Brazil World Cup campaign

Brazil’s hopes of entering the 2026 FIFA World Cup with a fully fit Neymar Jr have taken another worrying hit. Just days after Carlo Ancelotti included the veteran forward in his squad, fresh concerns emerged over the superstar’s physical condition following a new calf injury suffered at Santos.The timing could not be worse. Neymar had only recently returned to regular action after another difficult stretch with injuries, and many fans believed this World Cup could become his final major international stage. Instead, Brazil now heads into preparations with uncertainty hanging over its biggest name.Santos’ medical department confirmed the latest problem after Neymar missed the club’s Copa Sudamericana clash against San Lorenzo. Rodrigo Zogaib, head of Santos’ medical team, revealed the attacker suffered swelling in his right calf during the club’s 3-0 defeat to Coritiba."Neymar has a minor calf injury, an edema."The injury reportedly involves a 2-millimeter edema, which immediately raised concerns inside Brazil’s camp. According to reports from Brazil, Carlo Ancelotti and his coaching staff had already been monitoring Neymar closely before finalizing the World Cup squad.Still, Santos attempted to calm fears surrounding the former Barcelona and PSG star. Zogaib insisted Neymar remains on track to join Brazil’s camp later this month."But, according to our planning, his progress will allow him to be fit next week when he will join up with the national team."The 34-year-old is now expected to miss Santos’ upcoming matches against Gremio and Deportivo Cuenca as he focuses on rehabilitation ahead of Brazil’s World Cup preparations. Brazil will begin training on May 27 before facing Panama in a pre-tournament friendly on May 31.Despite the injury concerns, Carlo Ancelotti made it clear that Neymar still holds an important place inside Brazil’s dressing room. The Italian manager spoke openly after naming his squad and refused to place unrealistic pressure on the veteran playmaker."We have evaluated Neymar throughout the year. He is an important player, he will be again during this World Cup", the Italian said at a press conference."He has the same role and the same obligations as the other 25 players. He can play, not play, go out or be on the bench. He has the same responsibility as others. I want to be clear and honest. He will play if he deserves it. I think it is important not to put all expectations on a single player."Brazil enters the 2026 FIFA World Cup in Group C alongside Morocco, Haiti, and Scotland. Yet before fans can dream about trophies, all eyes remain fixed on Neymar’s recovery clock.
Article Summary: Neymar Jr suffered a fresh calf injury just days after being included in Brazil's 2026 FIFA World Cup squad. Santos confirmed the forward has swelling in his right calf but expects him to recover in time for Brazil’s preparations. Carlo Ancelotti backed Neymar publicly while stressing that no player is guaranteed a starting role ahead of the tournament.

Article Title: "Lying on BTS name": BTS fans clash with critics after FIFA president Gianni Infantino praises group ahead of World Cup halftime show
Article Text:
FIFA’s first-ever World Cup Final Halftime Show sparked massive online reactions after Gianni Infantino praised BTS alongside Madonna and Shakira as “global icons.” ARMY celebrated the announcement across social media, mocked critics who questioned BTS’ influence, and highlighted the group’s growing global legacy. Fans also revisited Jungkook’s historic 2022 FIFA performance while calling the upcoming halftime show “iconic,” “legendary,” and another history-making moment for BTS.

BTS FIFA halftime show reactions flood social media

FIFA World Cup halftime show sparks debate over BTS history

FIFA’s first-ever World Cup Final Halftime Show is already poised to be one of the most talked-about entertainment moments of 2026, and BTS fans are ensuring everyone knows their excitement – loud and clear. Social media was flooded with emotional reactions, celebratory posts, and scathing clapbacks aimed at critics who once doubted the group’s global pull after FIFA president Gianni Infantino publicly lauded BTS alongside Madonna and Shakira The conversation gained momentum after Pop Core shared Infantino’s statement: “Madonna, Shakira, and BTS are global icons whose music transcends borders and generations, and we are proud to welcome them to the first-ever FIFA World Cup Final Halftime Show curated by Chris Martin of Coldplay.” Within hours, ARMY flooded X with reactions ranging from proud celebration to direct responses against online criticism surrounding the group’s FIFA involvement.Many fans treated the announcement like a victory lap after years of debate about BTS and HYBE’s international influence. One viral comment read, “Oh hybe didn’t bought it Kpoopies y’all will be heal by fire from hating and get a life.” Another fan celebrated BTS’ continued dominance by writing, “BTS will keep making history and people will continue hating forever.”Several posts also focused on the larger impact BTS fans could bring to the event beyond music.One ARMY account highlighted charitable efforts tied to the tournament, posting, “Great! 👍 We’re not just watching a great show with legends .Armys 💜 are also helping raise funds for the FIFA Global Citizen Education Fund to support education and football for children around the world.”Others used the moment to mock critics who had previously questioned BTS’ inclusion.“Kpopies did you see that???😂😂😂 Still crying??? Karma slapped back🤭🔥,” one user wrote, while another added, “Bts karma is so real bro 😭😭.”The announcement also reignited conversations about BTS member Jungkook and his historic 2022 FIFA World Cup performance in Qatar. One fan attempted to correct online narratives by posting, “Reports of 2026 FIFA World Cup need corrected.""Jungkook made history as First Asian artist to perform FIFA World Cup ceremony with “Dreamers" in Qatar, 2022 BTS being reported as first Asian Artist for 2026 FIFA World Cup. Only First is FIFA Halftime.”Meanwhile, another user summed up the overall mood surrounding the collaboration by calling it “camp, iconic and legendary all at once 🌐.”With Madonna, Shakira, and BTS sharing the same global stage, FIFA may have created exactly what it wanted: a halftime spectacle that reaches generations, cultures, and fanbases all at once.
Article Summary: FIFA president Gianni Infantino praised BTS alongside Madonna and Shakira as “global icons.” ARMY celebrated the announcement across social media, mocked critics who questioned BTS’ influence, and highlighted the group’s growing global legacy.

Article Title: East Bengal end 22-year wait, lift national title by winning ISL
Article Text:
East Bengal have won the national league title after a 22 year gap, winning the 2025-26 ISL season. (Image: AIFF/ISL)

New Delhi:

Action from East Bengal vs Inter Kashi in the ISL. (Image: Emami East Bengal)

East Bengal players celebrate after scoring against Inter Kashi. (FanCode)

East Bengal on Thursday were crowned the 2025-26 Indian Super League (ISL) champions, fending off the challenge of four other clubs in what was a blockbuster final matchday of the truncated season.The last time East Bengal lifted the league title, in 2004, the top division of Indian football was called the National Football League. It has seen multiple avatars since: the I-League, Indian Super League and I-League before the current rendition in the ISL.In the 22 years since that glory, East Bengal have not been able to add to their three national league titles. They have finished second six times in the NFL/I-League era, while their best finish since joining the ISL fold had been ninth.Until this season.The current season of 13 games each produced a title race for the ages. East Bengal, city rivals Mohun Bagan Super Giant, Punjab FC, Mumbai City FC and Jamshedpur FC were all in with a chance as games kicked off simultaneously.So much so that the All India Football Federation (AIFF) stationed the shiny ISL trophy in their Kolkata office, with the Kishore Bharati Krirangan (temporary home of Inter Kashi) and Vivekananda Yuba Bharati Krirangan (home of Mohun Bagan Super Giant) as its destinations.Had the results gone any differently, the other options involved a flight for the glittering silverware, with one of Mumbai, Jamshedpur or Punjab as the final destination.In the end, holding their fate in their own hands, East Bengal came from behind and beat Inter Kashi 2-1 courtesy goals from Youssef Ezzejjari and Rashid.Mohun Bagan, who produced a comeback of their own to beat SC Delhi 2-1, were top of the table for 51 minutes as Alfred put Inter Kashi ahead. But with their title aspirations not in their hands, Mohun Bagan were denied and finish the season level with their city rivals but with an inferior goal difference.In the day's other games, Mumbai City FC beat Punjab FC 2-0 to take the third spot in the standings. Jamshedpur FC and Odisha FC played out a goalless draw.East Bengal manager Oscar Bruzon captured the emotions perfectly on the eve of the game. “We cannot hide from the fact that now it is one game for one title. If we want to take one game at a time, now is the moment to take one title at a time,” he said.On the pitch, the Red and Gold Brigade played like it was indeed “one title at a time”, with the intensity no different from what had already been visible throughout the season.With only one loss in the campaign, East Bengal have been far and away the best side. They have scored the most goals (30), have the strongest goal difference (+19), seen Youssef Ezzejjari bag the Golden Boot (11goals), while Miguel Figueira has provided the most assists (6).Ezzejjari’s impact has been felt most in home fixtures, with 10 of his 11 goals coming at the Vivekananda Yuba Bharati Krirangan. He has also been influential off the bench. In four games in which he was brought on, he scored three goals. Collectively, Ezzejjari and Edmund Lalrindika have been the most lethal attacking duo of the ISL season (15 goals).All statistics aside, East Bengal and their faithful will cherish this glory for a variety of reasons: edging their city rivals Mohun Bagan, reviving the Maidan rivalry for the sake of nostalgia, and above all, lifting the title after 22 years. And they deserve every bit of it.
Article Summary: East Bengal have won the national league title after a 22 year gap. The Red and Gold Brigade beat Inter Kashi 2-1 in the final matchday of the ISL season. Mohun Bagan Super Giant, Punjab FC, Mumbai City FC and Jamshedpur FC were all in with a chance.

Article Title: Chile footballer Jordhy Thompson proposes to girlfriend three years after he was charged with her attempted murder
Article Text:
Chile footballer Jordhy Thompson proposes to girlfriend three years after he was charged with her attempted murder (via Camila/Instagram)

Jordhy Thompson and Camila Sepúlveda restart relationship in Russia

Chilean footballer Jordhy Thompson has announced his engagement to longtime partner Camila Sepúlveda, three years after he was charged with her attempted murder in Chile. The 20-year-old, who currently plays for FC Orenburg in Russia, shared photos on Instagram showing the proposal taking place in Moscow’s famous Red Square. The couple appeared happy as Thompson went down on one knee during the romantic moment.The announcement quickly drew attention online because of the pair’s troubled history. Thompson faced serious legal charges in 2023 after prosecutors accused him of violently assaulting and attempting to strangle Sepúlveda during an altercation in Santiago. Despite the controversy and ongoing judicial proceedings, the couple later reunited and moved to Russia together. They are now raising their young son Valentín, alongside Sepúlveda’s older son Bruno from a previous relationship, while continuing their life abroad.Jordhy Thompson revealed the engagement through a series of Instagram pictures shared with his more than 200,000 followers. The footballer proposed in Moscow’s Red Square, where the couple celebrated the special moment together. Camila Sepúlveda later posted that what began as a simple walk through the city turned into a life-changing occasion after she accepted the proposal.Thompson also expressed his happiness, saying he looked forward to spending his future with her and their children.ID@undefinedCaption not available.ID@undefinedCaption not available.ID@undefinedCaption not available.Their relationship has remained under public scrutiny due to repeated allegations of domestic violence. In early 2023, a video circulated online that allegedly showed Thompson assaulting Sepúlveda. While he was still playing for Chilean club Colo-Colo. The incident led to a restraining order after she reported the matter to authorities.Later that year, prosecutors accused Thompson of carrying out another violent attack and attempting to suffocate his partner. He was arrested in Santiago and charged with frustrated femicide, a legal term in Chile referring to the attempted killing of a woman, along with contempt of court for allegedly violating previous legal restrictions.After spending time in preventive custody, Thompson was released under strict conditions that included house arrest and a no-contact order. His football career later continued after Russian club Orenburg secured his transfer following a legal agreement that temporarily lifted his travel restrictions.Sepúlveda eventually reunited with Thompson in Russia, where the couple welcomed their son in 2025. Reactions to the engagement on social media have been divided. Some fans congratulated the pair, while others questioned the decision because of the past allegations.
Article Summary: Jordhy Thompson proposed to girlfriend Camila Sepúlveda in Moscow's Red Square. The 20-year-old Chilean footballer was charged with her attempted murder in 2023. Couple later reunited and moved to Russia, where they have a young son.

Article Title: Real Madrid icon Dani Carvajal leaves out Alvaro Arbeloa from farewell dinner as dressing room tensions continue to build up
Article Text:
Real Madrid icon Dani Carvajal will leave by season end after 23 years, 450 games and six Champions League titles/ Image: Instagram

Dani Carvajal’s dinner snub adds to Real Madrid dressing room concerns

Real Madrid legend Dani Carvajal hosted a private dinner with several teammates and club staff members last night. However, one key figure was missing from the outing. Current Real Madrid head coach Alvaro Arbeloa was not invited.The news comes shortly after Real Madrid confirmed that Carvajal will leave the club at the end of the season. The veteran right-back will become a free agent once his contract expires this summer. Carvajal spent nearly two decades with Los Blancos after rising through the club academy. His departure marks the end of an important era for the Madrid giants. Reports of disagreements within the squad have also increased in recent months following the team’s disappointing campaign under Arbeloa.According to journalist Mario Cortegana on AS, Dani Carvajal invited a number of Real Madrid players and staff members to a farewell dinner earlier this week. However, Alvaro Arbeloa was not among the guests. The decision has raised fresh questions about the relationship between the coach and senior members of the squad.Real Madrid appointed Arbeloa as manager in January after parting ways with Xabi Alonso. Since then, the club has struggled badly.Los Blancos failed to win a single trophy this season. Reports of dressing room tensions have also emerged several times during the campaign.Midfielders Federico Valverde and Aurelien Tchouameni were even punished after reportedly getting involved in a training ground altercation. The latest dinner incident involving Carvajal has now further increased speculation about divisions inside the squad.Carvajal and Arbeloa previously shared a strong connection at Real Madrid. The two played together on 26 occasions during their time as teammates. However, things appear different since Arbeloa became head coach earlier this year. Carvajal has struggled for regular minutes under the 43-year-old manager. The defender has made 14 appearances across competitions since January but started only five matches.Meanwhile, Spain national team coach Luis de la Fuente recently explained why Carvajal was left out of Spain’s preliminary FIFA World Cup squad. Fuente praised the defender’s leadership qualities and importance to the national team. However, he admitted that the veteran is currently going through a difficult period due to limited playing time and fitness concerns.The Spain manager also suggested that selection decisions would only be based on performance and form. Carvajal has played 52 matches for Spain and helped the country win the UEFA European Championship and the UEFA Nations League. However, injuries restricted him to only 22 appearances for Real Madrid this season, with just nine starts across competitions.
Article Summary: Real Madrid legend Dani Carvajal hosted a private dinner with several teammates and club staff members last night. Current Real Madrid head coach Alvaro Arbeloa was not invited. The decision has raised fresh questions about the relationship between the coach and senior members of the squad. Reports of dressing room tensions have also emerged several times during the campaign.

Article Title: Will Indians be able to stream FIFA World Cup on YouTube?
Article Text:
Indian football fans may miss official FIFA World Cup 2026 coverage after broadcaster talks collapse and YouTube access faces geo-restrictions.

What the YouTube deal actually offers

FILE - A YouTube sign is shown near the company's headquarters in San Bruno, Calif., Wednesday, March 12, 2025. (AP Photo/Jeff Chiu, file)

People stand in front of a FIFA highlight video board during a tour of a FIFA Museum exhibit at Science World in Vancouver, British Columbia, Wednesday, May 13, 2026, ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup soccer tournament. (Ethan Cairns/The Canadian Press via AP)

Why India has no broadcaster

Prasar Bharati's exit

Where things stand

FIFA’s 2026 World Cup kicks off on June 11 in the United States, Canada and Mexico, and for the first time in the tournament’s history, YouTube is an official part of how the world will watch it, but for fans in India, that development may amount to very little, because without an official broadcaster to hold domestic rights and participate in the arrangement, geo-restrictions are likely to block most of the platform’s World Cup content from reaching Indian screens entirely. Hopes that Prasar Bharati could step in as a fallback option have also faded, after the broadcaster reportedly told the Delhi High Court it is not responsible for acquiring television rights for the 2026 FIFA World Cup in India, leaving the situation increasingly uncertain.In March 2026, FIFA announced what it called a "game-changing partnership" with YouTube, confirming that rights-holding broadcasters around the world would have the option to stream the opening ten minutes of every match live on their official YouTube channels, with the initiative designed to draw younger, digitally-native audiences toward the full broadcast. Beyond the ten-minute previews, broadcasters may also choose to stream a select number of matches in full on YouTube, though FIFA has been clear that this will vary by territory and is entirely at the discretion of individual rights holders rather than a guaranteed provision across all markets.Fans in the United States will have access to every match of the tournament live through YouTube TV, which holds rights in that market, while other official broadcasters, among them FOX Soccer, Telemundo Deportes, beIN Sports, SuperSport, JTBC and KBS, are expected to publish previews, highlights and potential full match streams through their own verified YouTube accounts.The official FIFA YouTube channel will additionally serve as a hub for highlights, archive footage, creator-led coverage and behind-the-scenes content throughout the tournament's 104-match duration.The critical limitation, however, is that all of this is tied to the regional rights structure. Content published by a broadcaster on YouTube is typically geo-restricted to the territory in which that broadcaster holds rights, which means that streams from American or European rights holders would not ordinarily be accessible to viewers here. Without a domestic broadcaster participating in the YouTube arrangement, there is no Indian channel through which any of that live content would flow, and the FIFA channel itself is not a substitute for the live match access that only a rights-holding broadcaster can provide on the platform. Without a domestic broadcaster participating in the YouTube arrangement, many fans may be pushed towards unofficial workarounds such as VPNs or piracy sites, or rely on informal online watch parties, none of which offer a stable or reliable viewing experience compared to official broadcasts.The reasons behind the deadlock are primarily commercial, and they have been accumulating for months. FIFA's original asking price for the combined Indian media rights covering the 2026 and 2030 World Cups was reported to be in the region of USD 100 million, a figure that drew little serious interest from broadcasters already heavily committed to cricket and IPL rights that have consumed the bulk of sports broadcasting budgets in recent years. FIFA subsequently reduced its valuation to approximately USD 35 million after the market failed to respond, but even that figure did not produce a deal. The Reliance Industries and Disney joint venture JioStar submitted a bid of around USD 20 million, which FIFA rejected. The scheduling reality of a North American tournament has compounded the reluctance, with most matches expected to air during late-night and early-morning hours in India, a timing problem that makes the commercial case for expensive rights considerably harder to justify against projected viewership numbers.The most consequential recent development came when Prasar Bharati, reportedly, told the Delhi High Court that acquiring the FIFA World Cup 2026 television rights is not its responsibility. The submission came in response to a petition seeking a free-to-air telecast of the tournament through the state broadcaster, an avenue that many had closely been watching as a potential last resort given the ongoing collapse of commercial negotiations. With Prasar Bharati having now formally distanced itself from any direct obligation to secure the rights, that option has effectively closed, and the rapidly approaching June 11 start date continues without any clear resolution.As it stands, no broadcaster has officially finalised Indian media rights for the FIFA World Cup 2026, with weeks remaining before the tournament begins. FIFA has reduced its asking price substantially, the only significant commercial bid on record has been rejected, and the state broadcaster has told a court the matter is not its concern. The YouTube partnership that FIFA has positioned as a landmark moment for global digital football access will reach fans across dozens of territories through their respective rights holders, but with no official rights holder in place here, Indian football fans face the very real prospect of the largest World Cup in history arriving with no legal and straightforward route to watch any of it, unless broadcasters, FIFA, or the government move quickly to break a deadlock that has already gone on far too long.
Article Summary: FIFA's 2026 World Cup kicks off on June 11 in the United States, Canada and Mexico. For the first time in the tournament’s history, YouTube is an official part of how the world will watch it. Without an official broadcaster to hold domestic rights and participate in the arrangement, geo-restrictions are likely to block most of the platform's World Cup content from reaching Indian screens. Hopes that Prasar Bharati could step in as a fallback option have also faded.

Article Title: Emiliano Martinez plays Europa League final with broken finger as Aston Villa beat SC Freiburg 3-0, Lionel Messi’s Argentina in fear ahead of World Cup
Article Text:
Emiliano Martinez plays Europa League final with broken finger as Aston Villa beat SC Freiburg 3-0, Lionel Messi’s Argentina in fear ahead of World Cup (via Getty)

Emiliano Martinez battles pain to inspire Aston Villa’s Europa League triumph

Aston Villa goalkeeper Emiliano “Dibu” Martinez stunned football fans after revealing that he played the UEFA Europa League final with a broken finger. The Argentina international suffered the injury during the warm-up before Villa’s clash against SC Freiburg in Istanbul. Despite the painful setback, Martinez decided to continue and gave an outstanding performance to help his team secure a famous 3-0 victory. His brave display became one of the biggest talking points after Aston Villa lifted their first major European trophy in decades.Martinez played the entire match with his finger heavily taped after receiving treatment from the club’s medical staff. The World Cup-winning goalkeeper made several important saves and kept a clean sheet as Villa completely dominated Freiburg. Goals from Youri Tielemans, Emiliano Buendía, and Morgan Rogers sealed a comfortable win for the Premier League side. After the match, Martinez admitted that controlling the ball was difficult because of the injury, but he was proud to continue fighting for his team on one of the biggest nights in the club’s history.Emiliano Martinez said the injury happened during the pre-match warm-up session and immediately caused problems with his handling.He told ESPN that every time he tried to catch the ball, his finger moved awkwardly because of the fracture. However, the 33-year-old goalkeeper refused to see the injury as a reason to quit the match. Instead, he viewed it as another challenge in his football career and decided to continue playing through the pain.The Aston Villa star praised the club’s supporters and described the team as family. He said representing Villa always fills him with pride and emotion. Martinez added that years of hard training and experience helped him stay focused despite the injury during such a high-pressure final.Villa completely outplayed Freiburg in Istanbul and wrapped up the victory with three excellent goals inside the first hour. Tielemans opened the scoring before Buendia and Rogers added two more goals to secure the trophy. Martinez’s confident goalkeeping ensured Freiburg never had a chance to make a comeback.After the match, the Argentine goalkeeper celebrated the victory with his teammates and laughed off concerns about the injury. Martinez also confirmed that he expects to be fully ready to represent Argentina national football team at the upcoming FIFA World Cup , where Lionel Scaloni’s side will begin their title defense against Jordan, Algeria, and Austria in the group stage.
Article Summary: Aston Villa beat SC Freiburg 3-0 in the UEFA Europa League final in Istanbul. Youri Tielemans, Emiliano Buendia, and Morgan Rogers scored for the Premier League side. Villa goalkeeper Emiliano Martinez played the entire match with a broken finger. The 33-year-old goalkeeper refused to see the injury as a reason to quit.

Article Title: ISL scenarios: Five contenders - who will win the title on the last matchday?
Article Text:
East Bengal are in pole position to win the 2025-26 ISL title. (Photo: AIFF/ISL)

ISL 2025-26 points table

Rank Club MP W D L GD Pts 1 East Bengal 12 6 5 1 18 23 2 Mohun Bagan 12 6 5 1 13 23 3 Bengaluru 13 6 5 2 6 23 4 Punjab 12 6 4 2 8 22 5 Mumbai City 12 6 4 2 6 22 6 Jamshedpur 12 6 3 3 5 21

ISL title scenarios

East Bengal (23 points in 12 games)

Mohun Bagan Super Giant (23 points in 12 games)

Bengaluru FC (23 points in 13 games)

Punjab FC are one of the five teams in contention for the ISL title on the last day. (Photo: AIFF/ISL)

Punjab FC (22 points in 12 games)

Mumbai City FC (22 points in 12 games)

Jamshedpur FC (21 points in 12 games)

At one stage, it looked like the Indian Super League won't get started. When it did, it has navigated multiple issues, fixture changes and scheduling has been absurd. But now that ISL 2025-26 has navigated these troubled waters, the last day has thrown up a staggering title race - something not seen before. As many as five teams are in contention to lift the title.On the weekend, in the first-ever ISL Kolkata derby that actually mattered, Mohun Bagan and East Bengal both scored late goals in a 1-1 draw.East Bengal, Mohun Bagan Super Giant and Bengaluru FC are all on 23 points. However, only the two Kolkata clubs can further their tally as Bengaluru FC have played their quota of 13 games in this truncated season. Punjab FC and Mumbai City FC are on 22 points with Jamshedpur FC behind on 21 points.The winner of the ISL title will go on to represent India in the continental competitions.Goal difference: +18Last match: Inter Kashi (A)East Bengal are in pole position for the title. They could have been in an even better position if they had taken all three points from the Kolkata derby against MBSG. All is not lost still.The Red and Gold Brigade can win their first league title in 22 years if they beat Inter Kashi, provided Mohun Bagan don't beat SC Delhi by a six-goal margin.Goal difference: +13Last match: SC Delhi (H)Mohun Bagan don't control their fate. They need Inter Kashi to beat East Bengal and then do the job themselves, beating SC Delhi by a six-goal margin - if it even comes to it.Goal difference: +6Even though Bengaluru FC have the same points as East Bengal and Mohun Bagan, they are not in contention for the title. They have played all of their 13 matches and will not be adding to their points tally. However, by virtue of inferior head-to-head against East Bengal, MBSG, Mumbai City FC and Punjab FC - who all can do 23 points or more - they will not be topping the standings.Goal difference: +8Last match: Mumbai City FC (H)A win against Mumbai City FC will take Punjab FC to 25 points. And for Punjab to win the title, they would need both East Bengal and Mohun Bagan to either lose or draw their final fixtures. A draw will not be enough for Punjab FC to lift the trophy.Goal difference: +6Last match: Punjab FC (A)For Mumbai City FC to win the title, first and foremost they need to beat Punjab FC. Additionally, they need East Bengal and Mohun Bagan not to win their games. A draw won't be enough for MCFC since East Bengal hold the edge there.Goal difference: 5Last match: Odisha FC (H)Jamshedpur FC need to beat Odisha FC in their last game and need a multiple of things to go their way. First and foremost, they need Inter Kashi and SC Delhi to do them a favour while also requiring Mumbai City FC and Punjab FC to draw (or lose) their games.
Article Summary: East Bengal, Mohun Bagan Super Giant and Bengaluru FC are all on 23 points. Punjab FC and Mumbai City FC are on 22 points with Jamshedpur FC behind on 21 points. The winner of the ISL title will go on to represent India in the continental competitions.

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumors: Detroit Lions linked to bold $33.2 million move that could reshape NFC hierarchy instantly
Article Text:
Detroit Lions Urged to Pursue $33.2 Million Chuba Hubbard Trade From Carolina Panthers (Getty Image)

Category Details Player Chuba Hubbard Current Team Carolina Panthers Rumored Team Detroit Lions Contract Status Multi-year deal Salary Cap Hit Part of reported $33.2 million contract Trade Likelihood Moderate to low Latest Insider Update FanSided’s Jake Beckman linked Detroit as possible fit Potential Return Draft capital or mid-level offensive assets

Which Teams Are Interested in Chuba Hubbard?

What Insiders Are Saying About the Trade Rumors

Contract Details and Salary Cap Implications

How the Trade Could Impact Both Teams

FAQs

Is Chuba Hubbard getting traded?

Which team is most likely to acquire Hubbard?

Why would the Lions want to trade for Hubbard?

When is the NFL trade deadline?

What is Hubbard's current contract situation?

Rumors around the Detroit Lions’ backfield continue to grow after the team moved on from running back David Montgomery in a trade to the Houston Texans earlier this offseason. With Detroit trying to rebound from a disappointing 2025 campaign that ended well below expectations, one new name has surfaced in speculation circles. According to FanSided’s Jake Beckman, the Lions could explore a move for Chuba Hubbard of the Carolina Panthers. Hubbard is entering the middle years of a reported $33.2 million deal, and the idea of pairing him with Jahmyr Gibbs has quickly become one of the more talked-about roster possibilities around Detroit.Right now, the Lions are the team generating the most noise around a Chuba Hubbard move. And the fit makes sense on paper. Detroit's offense has leaned heavily on a two-back system, and with Montgomery gone, Jahmyr Gibbs loses the complementary piece that made that backfield so effective last season.Hubbard, at 26 years old, checks the boxes Detroit would be looking for. He is young, proven over a full season, and capable in both the run and pass game. If Dan Campbell wants to keep the offense operating at a high level heading into 2026, adding a back who has rushed for over 1,100 yards in a season is not a bad place to start.Beyond Detroit, no other teams have been publicly connected to Hubbard. But with running back value climbing across the league this offseason, it would not be surprising to see other contenders circle back if this rumor picks up any real momentum.FanSided's Jake Beckman was the one who brought this idea into the conversation. He made the case directly: "If they wanted to get greedy and make sure they really crushed everything, they could try to get Chuba Hubbard from Carolina."But Beckman was not entirely bullish. He added: "The problem with that is usable running backs are at a premium right now, and the price for a guy like Hubbard is going to be a little bit higher than it was a month ago."That is the crux of the issue. This is not a rumor coming from beat reporters or sources inside either organization. It is more of an analytical suggestion - smart, but speculative. There is no indication that Carolina has fielded calls or that Detroit has made a formal inquiry. Until that changes, this sits firmly in the "what if" category.The $33.2 million figure attached to Hubbard reflects his overall contract value, not just a single-year cap number. That kind of commitment for a running back who put up just 511 rushing yards in 2025 would raise eyebrows around the league.His dip in production last season matters here. Hubbard was outstanding in 2024 - 1,195 rushing yards, 10 touchdowns, averaging 4.8 yards per carry on 250 attempts. But 2025 was a step back. He played 15 games, carried the ball 134 times for 511 yards and one score. That is not the kind of trajectory that makes a team eager to fork over significant draft capital and salary.No buyout or no-trade clause details have been made public, but given that he is projected to be Carolina's starter in 2026, the Panthers would need strong compensation to even consider listening.For Detroit, the upside is obvious. Hubbard alongside Gibbs would give the Lions one of the more dangerous backfield duos in the NFC. Their offense has always thrived on physicality and balance, and replacing Montgomery's workload with someone of Hubbard's caliber keeps that identity alive. It also strengthens their Super Bowl window, which Dan Campbell clearly believes is still open despite missing the playoffs last season.For Carolina, it is harder to see the logic. The Panthers are in a rebuilding phase, but trading your projected starting running back before the season begins creates a hole they may not be able to fill. Unless Detroit is willing to part with a meaningful pick - a second-rounder or better - this deal does not move the needle for Carolina.The more realistic outcome is that Detroit looks toward a cheaper, more available option. Hubbard is a reasonable target in theory, but the Panthers' unwillingness to deal makes this one tough to pull off.There is no confirmed trade at this point. The idea was floated by a FanSided analyst, but no official talks have been reported between the Lions and Panthers.Detroit is the only team publicly connected to him at the moment, though that could change if the rumor gains traction.Detroit traded David Montgomery to Houston this offseason. With Jahmyr Gibbs now the lone proven back on the roster, the Lions are looking at options to rebuild depth and maintain their two-back offensive system.The 2026 NFL trade deadline falls on November 4, 2026, at 4 PM ET.Hubbard is under contract with the Panthers and is projected to be their starting running back heading into the 2026 season. His reported trade value sits around $33.2 million.
Article Summary: Chuba Hubbard is a projected starter for the Carolina Panthers in 2026. He is entering the middle years of a reported $33.2 million contract. The Panthers are in a rebuilding phase, but trading your projected starting running back before the season begins creates a hole they may not be able to fill.

Article Title: Matthew Stafford contract details: How much money will NFL MVP earn after signing his latest Rams extension?
Article Text:
Matthew Stafford contract extension details (Getty Images)

Why did the Rams commit another $105 million to Matthew Stafford?



What does Stafford’s extension mean for Ty Simpson and the Rams’ future?



The Los Angeles Rams removed any remaining uncertainty around Matthew Stafford ’s future on Thursday, locking the reigning NFL MVP into a new deal that keeps him tied to the franchise through the 2027 season. The extension, reportedly worth up to $60 million for one additional year, arrives after Stafford delivered one of the most productive seasons of his 17-year career. More than just a financial reward, the agreement sends a clear message about the Rams’ priorities. Even with Stafford entering his age-38 season and the team drafting quarterback Ty Simpson in the first round, Los Angeles still believes its championship window is open right now.Reigning NFL MVP Matthew Stafford and the Los Angeles Rams reached agreement Thursday on a one-year, $55 million extension. The Rams did not make this move out of sentiment. Stafford earned it with production that left little room for hesitation.Last season, he led the NFL with 4,707 passing yards and 46 touchdown passes while throwing only eight interceptions. His playoff numbers were just as strong. Stafford threw for 936 yards and six touchdowns across three postseason games before the Rams’ season ended against the eventual Super Bowl champion Seattle Seahawks.That performance changed the tone of conversations around his future. Retirement had quietly hovered in the background over the past two seasons, especially after Stafford admitted he was approaching things on a year-to-year basis. But when he confirmed during his MVP acceptance speech in February that he planned to return for an 18th season, the Rams quickly moved toward securing him beyond 2026.Sean McVay has never hidden how highly the organization values Stafford. In March, the Rams coach said Stafford is "gonna be able to play as long as he's able to.""Whether that's one, two more, who knows, he might be one of those guys that plays late into his 40s and I wouldn't have a problem with that," McVay said in March.Financially, the extension also reflects where the quarterback market currently stands. Stafford’s updated deal is now worth up to $105 million over two seasons. If incentives are reached, his annual average would place him alongside some of the league’s highest-paid quarterbacks.The timing of the extension makes the Rams’ draft strategy more interesting.Los Angeles used the No. 13 overall pick on Ty Simpson only weeks ago, a move that immediately sparked questions about succession planning. By extending Stafford through 2027, the Rams are signaling that Simpson is not expected to contribute anytime soon. Instead, the rookie will spend at least the next two years developing behind one of the league’s most experienced quarterbacks.That creates pressure elsewhere on the roster. Drafting a quarterback in the middle of a championship push always invites scrutiny, particularly for a team still built to contend immediately. The Rams clearly believe they can balance both timelines.General manager Les Snead already pushed deeper into win-now mode earlier this offseason by strengthening the secondary with former Chiefs cornerback Trent McDuffie. After defensive struggles hurt Los Angeles late last year, the front office is betting roster upgrades around Stafford can help extend this Super Bowl window a little longer.For now, the Rams are not planning for life after Stafford. They are still chasing another title with him.
Article Summary: Reigning NFL MVP Matthew Stafford and the Los Angeles Rams reached agreement Thursday on a one-year, $55 million extension. Stafford’s updated deal is now worth up to $105 million over two seasons. If incentives are reached, his annual average would place him alongside some of the league's highest-paid quarterbacks.

Article Title: Josh Allen instantly names Hailee Steinfeld's biggest pet peeve and his answer is absolutely perfect
Article Text:
Josh Allen instantly names Hailee Steinfeld's biggest pet peeve (Getty Images)

Josh Allen reveals the one habit that instantly annoys wife Hailee Steinfeld

Buffalo Bills quarterback Josh Allen has had quite an offseason -- a new baby, a growing marriage, and now, a very specific admission about what drives his actress wife Hailee Steinfeld absolutely crazy. The two welcomed their first child earlier this year and are approaching their first wedding anniversary. But it turns out even a picture-perfect NFL marriage has its friction points, and Allen is happy to own up to his.During a recent appearance on the Trainwreck Sports podcast, Josh Allen was asked point-blank what he does that gets under Steinfeld's skin. He didn't need long to think. Every time she reaches toward his beard to clean something off, he snaps."Anytime she tries to, like, if I've got something in my beard or in my mustache and she tries to reach for it... I always, like, bark and snap," Allen admitted on the show.ID@undefinedCaption not available.ID@undefinedCaption not available.And the reason? It goes back further than his marriage. Allen traced it straight to his father, recalling how as a kid, he and his siblings would touch the whiskers on their dad's face and get the exact same growl in return."It's something my dad did, you know, when we'd be little kids touching the whiskers on his face and he'd like, 'Aargh!'" Allen laughed.What makes it funnier is that Allen is fully aware of the habit and has zero intention of stopping."Every time I do that, it gets her every single time. And that's... I can't not do it! It's like, it's there for the taking, and I have to take it," he said.It's the kind of small, completely harmless domestic quirk that actually says a lot about where this couple is. They are not walking on eggshells around each other. Allen is comfortable enough to tease his wife, laugh about it on a national podcast, and not remotely worry about the fallout. That ease, barely a year into marriage and with a newborn at home, suggests the two have built something more settled than most.The timing of the interview also adds another layer to the story. The couple recently welcomed their first child and have spent much of the offseason together away from football. Allen has appeared more relaxed publicly in recent months, whether during podcasts or social media clips, and those appearances have shown a side of him Bills fans rarely see during the season.
Article Summary: Buffalo Bills quarterback Josh Allen reveals the one habit that annoys his wife Hailee Steinfeld. Every time she reaches toward his beard to clean something off, he snaps. Allen traced it straight to his father, recalling how as a kid, he and his siblings would touch the whiskers on their dad's face.

Article Title: Taylor Swift's wedding is being called a 'controversial situation' and it involves a very loose-lipped future father-in-law
Article Text:
Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce (Getty Images)

Why is Taylor Swift keeping Ed Kelce out of the wedding loop?

Will Blake Lively be at Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding?

Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are reportedly set to marry on July 3 in New York City, but the planning process has been anything but conventional. According to sources close to the Daily Mail, Swift is running an unusually tight operation around the ceremony details and has deliberately limited what even close family members are being told. At the center of it is a surprisingly awkward situation involving her future father-in-law, Ed Kelce.Multiple sources told the Daily Mail that Ed simply cannot be trusted with sensitive information. "He's sort of like a loose cannon," one insider said. "Nobody knows what he's going to say, so it's kind of a controversial situation." The concern traces back to the couple's engagement in August 2025, when Ed spoke publicly with News 5 Cleveland and detailed exactly how Travis proposed at his Missouri home."He got her out there, they were about to go out to dinner, and he said, 'let's go out and have a glass of wine'...they got out there, and that's when he asked her, and it was beautiful," Ed recalled. He also revealed that the couple immediately FaceTimed family members to share the news. For Swift, who has built a career around controlling her own narrative, that level of unsolicited disclosure was apparently a step too far.The wedding security extends well beyond Ed. Donna and Kylie Kelce, along with several close friends, are also reportedly in the dark. Swift has ditched physical invitations entirely and is personally calling each guest instead. In an even more calculated move, she's allegedly sharing slightly different details with different people, creating an intentional paper trail. "If any information does surface publicly, it could help identify where the leak came from," a source explained.Almost certainly not. Swift's former close friend Blake Lively reportedly fell out of favor after Lively's legal battle with director Justin Baldoni became entangled with Swift's private text messages, which ended up as public court record. "The main issue was the fact that her private text messages to her friend became public record and her friend dragged her into something that made her look poorly to the public," an insider told the Daily Mail."That's what really bothered her. It was like, 'OK, you f—ked up my reputation.' It's the reputation that she cares about the most." On the other hand, the guest list is reportedly wide, with sources saying people who have a "slim to no relationship" with the couple are being invited.
Article Summary: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are reportedly set to marry on July 3 in New York City. Sources say Swift is running an unusually tight operation around the ceremony details. At the center of it is a surprisingly awkward situation involving her future father-in-law.

Article Title: "He’s trying to keep up with his wife": NFL legend drops alarming Travis Kelce warning amid whirlwind life with Taylor Swift
Article Text:
NFL legend Cris Carter raised concerns about Travis Kelce trying to keep pace with Taylor Swift’s nonstop lifestyle, warning it could impact the Kansas City Chiefs star’s future. Carter and former analyst Todd McShay questioned Kelce’s conditioning and offseason focus, though Carter still expects solid production in 2026. With Kenneth Walker III joining the Chiefs offense, Kelce’s role may evolve as Kansas City leans more on its running game this season.

Cris Carter questions Travis Kelce’s pace off the field

Travis Kelce’s Chiefs role may evolve in 2026

The spotlight around Travis Kelce has rarely been brighter, and this offseason, the attention has stretched far beyond football. As the Kansas City Chiefs tight end prepares for what could be another defining NFL season, conversations about his relationship with Taylor Swift continue to dominate headlines. This time, though, the criticism is coming from inside football circles.Former NFL star Cris Carter recently shared concerns about Kelce’s lifestyle and long-term focus, raising questions about whether the veteran tight end is struggling to balance football with the nonstop pace surrounding Swift’s global fame. The comments quickly sparked debate online, especially with Kelce entering his age-36 season and facing growing scrutiny about his conditioning and production.Speaking on the Fully Loaded Podcast, Carter openly wondered whether Kelce is trying too hard to match Swift’s demanding lifestyle instead of slowing down during the later stage of his career.“I still think he’s trying to keep up with his wife, dude. Because he retires like it, sitting at home. And she’s not retired. She’s gone. She’s moving,” Carter said. “So, I think it’s better for him to keep getting this last year. It’s a hard one to keep up with. And $12 million to $15 million, just in case it doesn’t work out with her. You might need that.”The remarks added another layer to the ongoing discussion surrounding Kelce’s offseason.Since getting engaged to Swift in August 2025, the Chiefs star has spent much of his downtime traveling publicly with the pop icon, appearing at major events and attracting constant social media attention.Carter was not alone in questioning Kelce’s preparation either. Former ESPN analyst Todd McShay made similar comments last year while discussing Kelce’s fitness.“Every show I watch, every pregame show, halftime show, postgame show, weekday show, every broadcast I watch for the last few weeks, it’s like, are we not allowed to say that he’s out of shape?” McShay said. “He’s been partying all offseason. He’s been jet-setting around with the most famous person, probably in the entire world. That he’s drinking, going to the US Open, he’s got cocktails in it.”Despite the criticism, Carter still expects Kelce to remain productive in Kansas City’s offense. The Hall of Famer predicted another solid statistical season while also warning that the arrival of Kenneth Walker III could shift how the Chiefs operate offensively.“I still think between 70 and 85 catches,” Carter added. “I think he’s still going to be close to a thousand yards. You want to be really effective in the red zone, especially as you get older, you get so much smarter, the body starts slowing down, but the ability to play with Patrick coming back. They got a big-time running back now.”Kelce finished the 2025 regular season with 76 receptions for 851 yards, numbers that remained strong by most standards but still triggered conversation about whether his peak years are fading. Kansas City’s likely shift toward a more balanced offense with Walker could reduce Kelce’s overall targets while increasing his efficiency in key moments.Still, people close to Kelce insist his preparation has not slipped. His mother, Donna Kelce, recently explained that the veteran tight end has already begun his demanding offseason routine ahead of organized team activities.With training camp approaching, Kelce now enters another season carrying expectations both on and off the field. And fairly or unfairly, every part of his personal life continues to shape the conversation around his football future.
Article Summary: Cris Carter questions Travis Kelce’s pace off the field, warning it could impact his future. Carter and former analyst Todd McShay questioned Kelce's conditioning and offseason focus. Carter still expects Kelce to remain productive in Kansas City's offense in 2026.

Article Title: Gisele Bundchen and Tom Brady back in spotlight after viral Gucci runway debut sparks frenzy

Tom Brady surprised fans after making a bold runway debut at Gucci’s New York fashion show alongside major celebrities. The viral appearance quickly caught the attention of his ex-wife, Gisele Bundchen, who reportedly found the moment “fun to watch.” While Bundchen has moved on with her private life and marriage to Joaquim Valente, Brady continues drawing headlines through fashion appearances and ongoing dating rumors involving stars like Alix Earle, Irina Shayk, Sofia Vergara, and Kim Kardashian.

Tom Brady’s Gucci runway debut shocks Gisele Bunchen and NFL fans

Gisele Bundchen moves forward while Tom Brady avoids serious dating commitments

Tom Brady traded football stadiums for fashion spotlights this weekend, and the internet could not stop talking about it. The NFL legend stunned fans after appearing at Gucci’s star-studded runway show in New York City, where celebrities from music, film, and fashion gathered for one of the biggest style events of the season.But while Brady’s confident catwalk moment quickly went viral online, another name quietly entered the conversation. His former wife, supermodel Gisele Bundchen , reportedly had an unexpected reaction after watching clips of the retired quarterback step into the modelling world she dominated for years.Tom Brady looked surprisingly relaxed while making his runway debut at the Gucci event on Saturday night. Dressed in a sleek black leather outfit, the seven-time Super Bowl champion walked beside stars including Mariah Carey, Lindsay Lohan and Shawn Mendes.Social media exploded within minutes. Some fans praised Brady for confidently reinventing himself after retirement, while others joked that the former quarterback was now entering his “fashion era.” The runway clips quickly spread across TikTok, Instagram, and X, proving Brady still knows how to dominate headlines long after leaving the NFL.The moment also reportedly caught Gisele Bundchen’s attention. According to Rob Shuter’s Naughty But Nice Substack, a source claimed Bundchen enjoyed seeing Brady’s fashion debut unfold online.“She thought it was fun to watch,” the source reportedly said.Still, the insider also hinted that professional modelling is not something mastered overnight, even by one of football’s most recognizable athletes. That subtle reaction sparked fresh discussions online, especially because Bundchen spent decades ruling luxury fashion campaigns and international runways before stepping away from full-time modelling.Since their high-profile divorce in 2022, both Brady and Bundchen have moved in very different directions personally and professionally. Bundchen reportedly married jiu-jitsu instructor Joaquim Valente in a private Florida ceremony last year and has largely kept her personal life away from constant media attention.Brady, meanwhile, continues attracting dating rumors without publicly committing to anyone. Over the past year, the retired quarterback has been linked to influencer Alix Earle, model Irina Shayk, actress Sofia Vergara and reality star Kim Kardashian.Despite the speculation, reports continue suggesting Brady is not focused on finding a serious relationship right now. One source told Daily Mail, “Tom isn’t dating anyone specifically. He’s not really looking for that.”For now, Brady’s unexpected Gucci appearance has given fans another reminder that even after football, he still knows how to command attention in every room he enters.
Article Summary: The NFL legend stunned fans after making a bold runway debut at Gucci’s New York fashion show. The viral appearance quickly caught the attention of his ex-wife, Gisele Bundchen, who reportedly found the moment “fun to watch.” While Bundchen has moved on with her private life, Brady continues drawing headlines through fashion appearances and ongoing dating rumors.

Article Title: "You're inviting people to.....": Divorce lawyer warns Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini to stay silent amid affair rumors
Article Text:
Celebrity divorce lawyer James Sexton sparked online debate after sharing blunt advice about handling public scandals, with many linking his comments to ongoing rumors involving Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini. Sexton warned that early public statements during a PR crisis can create lasting damage and make controversies worse. While no allegations have been confirmed, social media speculation continues growing. The discussion also drew comparisons to the intense public scrutiny surrounding Travis Kelce and Taylor Swift’s highly watched relationship and ongoing wedding rumors.

Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini controversy sparks PR debate

Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini rumors continue dominating NFL social media

Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini continue to face intense online attention after fresh commentary from celebrity divorce lawyer James Sexton added another layer to the growing public relations storm. As social media speculation keeps spreading, Sexton believes the pair may already have made a critical mistake by responding too early.The discussion exploded after clips from Sexton’s remarks began circulating online. His blunt assessment quickly grabbed attention from NFL fans and media watchers who have followed the rumors surrounding the former New England Patriots linebacker and the veteran NFL reporter over the last several days.James Sexton did not hold back while discussing how public figures often mishandle controversy in its earliest stages. According to him, silence can sometimes become the strongest defense when emotions and speculation are moving faster than facts.He explained:"Something you do early on in a PR crisis can have a ripple effect that you can't fix. Those first days are really critical"That statement immediately resonated online because many fans believe the current situation surrounding Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini escalated after initial responses and public reactions began fueling even more discussion.Sexton also warned that once someone publicly addresses accusations or rumors, they often lose control of the conversation. He described it in striking terms:"In that first statement she did, you're inviting people to just latch on like a pitbull and they just close the jaws and you're not getting them off"The comments quickly went viral across X and TikTok, where users debated whether public silence actually helps celebrities survive scandals in today’s nonstop social media cycle.While neither Mike Vrabel nor Dianna Russini has directly confirmed many of the online claims tied to the controversy, the internet has continued building its own narratives. That constant speculation has created an environment where every statement, post, or appearance becomes part of the larger discussion.Sexton believes continuing to respond publicly may only make things worse. He offered one final piece of advice that many users online are now dissecting:"If you're going to talk, you probably got to keep talking because you have to defend your prior statement. Whereas, if you just keep your mouth shut completely, it’s like trying to put a nail through Jello, it won't work"The remarks have now turned a celebrity rumor cycle into a broader conversation about crisis management, media pressure, and how quickly public opinion can spiral in the digital age.
Article Summary: Celebrity divorce lawyer James Sexton warned that early public statements during a PR crisis can create lasting damage and make controversies worse. The comments quickly went viral across X and TikTok, where users debated whether public silence actually helps celebrities survive scandals in today’s nonstop social media cycle.

Article Title: Who is Aaron Rodgers' wife, Brittani? Everything we know about the NFL's most mysterious WAG
Article Text:
Aaron Rodgers’ wife Brittani remains a mystery (Imagn Images)

Meet Brittani with an i: The invisible woman behind Aaron Rodgers’ final NFL chapter



"I knew that there was something crazy special about this and I wanted to be with her,"

Nobody has seen Aaron Rodgers’ wife, and the internet is losing its mind over it



Aaron Rodgers says Brittani helped influence his final NFL decision before retirement

Aaron Rodgers is retiring after 2026. He's got a Super Bowl ring, a Hall of Fame career, and a wife nobody has ever seen. Not one photo. Not one public appearance. Not even a last name.Meet Brittani — the most talked-about mystery in the NFL right now.Rodgers first mentioned her in December 2024 on The Pat McAfee Show, casually dropping that he had a girlfriend named Brittani. One co-host immediately asked, "Spears?" Rodgers clarified: "Not Britney Spears. This is Brittani with an i."She doesn't have social media. She doesn't watch the show. And she has absolutely no public presence.By June 2025, a reporter spotted a ring on Rodgers' finger at a press conference and asked about it. His answer? Yeah, it's a wedding ring. Married "a couple of months" ago. That was it. No details, no name confirmation, no nothing.They first met in 2017, back when Rodgers was still in Green Bay. He says he knew immediately.he said on the Pat McAfee Show in March 2026.She reportedly told him early on she'd never live in Green Bay and never wanted to be a player's wife.Rodgers also dropped one interesting hint that she had "moved back across the pond" around the time they met. So she's possibly European, or at least lived abroad.She wants zero public life. Rodgers has been clear about that every time he's been asked.Rodgers spent years in very public relationships — Olivia Munn, Danica Patrick, and Shailene Woodley. These were tabloid relationships. Cover stories. So when one of the most famous quarterbacks in NFL history suddenly has a secret wife that nobody, not even his teammates' partners, has ever met, people are going to ask questions.His Steelers teammates' wives reportedly haven't met her. She skipped every game last season. One person inside the team described her as "like a phantom."Fox Sports reporter Jen Hale confirmed in January 2026 that people inside NFL circles know she's real and that Rodgers is genuinely happy. That's about as much third-party confirmation as anyone's gotten.Rodgers just signed a $25 million deal for one final season with the Steelers and said Brittani was a big part of that decision. She reportedly wanted him to go for it one more time.So she's real. She's involved. She's just completely invisible.The public's curiosity isn't weird, it's natural. A 42-year-old NFL legend with a mystery wife who's never been seen is a story. Rodgers can want privacy and the internet can want answers. Both things are true at the same time.For now, though, Brittani with an i remains exactly that. Just a name.
Article Summary: Aaron Rodgers has a wife nobody has ever seen. She doesn't have social media. She has absolutely no public presence. She reportedly told him early on she'd never live in Green Bay and never wanted to be a player's wife. Rodgers just signed a $25 million deal for one final season.

Article Title: New York Liberty vs. Golden State Valkyries: Breanna Stewart surpasses Becky Hammon milestone despite heartbreaking loss
Article Text:
Breanna Stewart. Image via: Sarah Stier/ Getty Images

Breanna Stewart achieves major career milestone, overtakes Becky Hammon despite defeat



Liberty faces a devastating 17-point defeat against Valkyries



New York Liberty star Breanna Stewart added another historic achievement to her decorated career Thursday night, though the celebration never fully arrived inside Barclays Center. While the Liberty struggled to match the energy and defensive pressure of the Golden State Valkyries, Stewart quietly climbed past one of the franchise’s most respected names in the record books during an otherwise frustrating evening for New York.The Liberty entered the matchup hoping to build momentum after a lengthy break following their win over the Portland Fire. Instead, the rust showed almost immediately. Golden State controlled the pace, forced turnovers, and never allowed New York to settle comfortably into its offense. By halftime, the Valkyries already looked sharper. The third quarter only widened the gap as the visitors tightened their grip on the game.Even during the loss, Breanna Stewart still found a way to leave her mark on Liberty history.According to ESPN Insights, Stewart passed Becky Hammon for fifth place on the franchise’s all-time scoring list.The milestone came in just 114 games since Stewart joined New York in 2023, an impressive pace considering the names attached to Liberty history.Hammon spent years serving as the face of the organization after joining the franchise in 1999. The former Liberty guard developed into a three-time All-Star in New York before later transitioning into coaching, where she eventually guided the Las Vegas Aces to multiple championships.Stewart’s impact has been just as transformative for New York. After arriving from the Seattle Storm in free agency, she helped reshape the Liberty into title contenders alongside Sabrina Ionescu and Jonquel Jones. That journey reached its peak last season when New York secured its first WNBA championship.Thursday’s performance reflected Stewart’s consistency even on an off night for the team. She finished with 18 points and nine rebounds while continuing to carry much of the offensive load.Golden State deserved full credit for disrupting nearly everything New York tried offensively.Gabby Williams led the Valkyries with 16 points and knocked down four three-pointers, while Veronica Burton added 13 points and seven assists. Kaila Charles also chipped in 13 points in another strong all-around effort.The Valkyries set the tone early by forcing seven turnovers in the opening quarter alone. New York never fully recovered from that shaky start. Golden State then delivered its best stretch after halftime, holding the Liberty to just 12 points in the third quarter while repeatedly turning defense into easy transition opportunities.The absence of Ionescu also continued to loom large. The Liberty guard remains sidelined with a foot injury, while newly acquired Satou Sabally made her long-awaited debut after recovering from a concussion suffered during last year’s playoffs. Sabally finished with five points in limited minutes as she continues working back into game condition.
Article Summary: Breanna Stewart passed Becky Hammon for fifth place on the Liberty's all-time scoring list. The milestone came in just 114 games since Stewart joined the team in 2023. The Liberty lost 17-point to the Golden State Valkyries at Barclays Center.

Article Title: Evan Mobley’s net worth in 2026: Earnings, endorsements, investments, lifestyle and more
Article Text:
Evan Mobley. Image via: Rich Storry/ Getty Images

Evan Mobley’s net worth and career earnings



Here’s a breakdown of his financial profile entering 2026:

Category Evan Mobley Estimated Net Worth (2026) $15 million NBA Team Cleveland Cavaliers Career Earnings Over $83.1 million Current Contract 5 years, up to $269 million Average Annual Salary $53.8 million Major Endorsements adidas, Panini, AT&T, Chipotle, New Era NBA Honors NBA All-Star, All-Defensive First Team Main Investments Real estate and long-term financial assets Rookie Contract 4 years, $36.7 million

Evan Mobley has quietly grown into one of the NBA’s most valuable young stars, and his financial rise is beginning to match his impact on the floor. While bigger personalities often dominate headlines, Mobley’s steady development with the Cleveland Cavaliers has turned him into a franchise centerpiece and one of basketball’s highest-paid rising talents entering 2026.That attention has only increased after another strong playoff run and his massive long-term contract extension with Cleveland. Fans are now searching beyond his shot-blocking and All-Star appearances, wanting a closer look at how much the 24-year-old has earned, where his money comes from, and how quickly his financial profile is expanding alongside his career.As of 2026, Mobley’s estimated net worth sits around $15 million, according to multiple reports, including Clutch Sports. That number is expected to rise sharply over the next few seasons after the Cavaliers handed him a five-year rookie extension worth up to $269 million.Before becoming one of the league’s highest-paid young forwards, Mobley built his reputation through consistency and patience. Born in San Diego, he starred at Rancho Christian School before becoming one of the nation’s top recruits. His lone season at USC Trojans men's basketball confirmed his status as a future NBA star after averaging 16.4 points, 8.7 rebounds, and 2.9 blocks per game.Cleveland selected him third overall in the 2021 NBA Draft, and the fit immediately worked. Mobley helped transform the Cavaliers into one of the NBA’s strongest defensive teams while steadily improving his offensive game every season.Mobley’s biggest financial leap came when Cleveland committed fully to him with a fully guaranteed extension that runs through 2030. His salary for the 2025-26 season alone exceeds $46 million, with annual earnings increasing each year afterward.Off the court, Mobley has steadily added endorsement deals without aggressively chasing celebrity attention. Adidas signed him to a long-term shoe agreement shortly after he entered the NBA. Companies like Panini, AT&T, Chipotle, and New Era Cap also partnered with the Cavaliers star.His growth on offense has helped elevate his market value even further. Questions about his shooting followed him early in his career, but Mobley answered many of them during the 2025-26 season by stretching defenses consistently from beyond the arc while remaining one of basketball’s elite defenders.At 6-foot-11, Mobley already anchors one of the NBA’s best defensive frontcourts alongside Jarrett Allen. What makes executives around the league pay attention, though, is how naturally his game continues evolving. He protects the rim, switches onto guards, rebounds, and now scores with far more confidence than he did entering the league.There is still very little flash around Mobley’s lifestyle compared to many NBA stars. He largely keeps his private life quiet, and unlike some of basketball’s biggest names, he is not widely known for luxury car collections or extravagant spending habits. That reserved personality has become part of his image.
Article Summary: Evan Mobley has quietly grown into one of the NBA’s most valuable young stars. The 24-year-old signed a five-year rookie extension worth up to $269 million. His salary for the 2025-26 season alone exceeds $46 million, with annual earnings increasing each year afterward.
